keyRules: Maximum 120 m above the ground (EASA Open Category)
Register as a UAS operator (free), if the drone weighs 250 g or more or has a camera
A1/A3 online training is required – minimum age 16
Mandatory advance notice of 5 days for all flights
Restricted Archaeological Sites: the Acropolis, Delphi, Olympia, and others
Always maintain visual line of sight (VLOS) with the drone
Never fly over people, crowds, or public events
Minimum distance of 8 km from each airport
Night flights are prohibited without special permission
Island airports: Check the DAGR map carefully—many islands have large CTRs
importantNotes: Mandatory 5-day advance notice for ALL flights
Archaeological sites and cultural heritage monuments are strictly off-limits—heavy fines apply
Island airports create extensive restricted zones
Military installations: absolute no-fly zones (many on islands)
The GDPR applies when identifiable individuals are recorded

fields.disclaimerText: Before every flight, always check the official sources of the Hellenic Civil Aviation Authority (HCAA) and the DAGR map. This app is a tool—not a legal authority. Greece follows EASA regulations with national additions, including, among other things, the mandatory 5-day flight notification requirement.
